title: Summarize column removing duplicates
excerpt: I’ve got a board where there are Campaigns (Groups) with Tactics (Items) and Ad Sizes (Sub-Items). At each Tactic (Item) level there is a URL column. This can be the same across Tactics (or different) within a Campaign. …

posts.author: AlichiaS (Ali Sawitoski)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve got a board where there are Campaigns (Groups) with Tactics (Items) and Ad Sizes (Sub-Items). At each Tactic (Item) level there is a URL column. This can be the same across Tactics (or different) within a Campaign. My team needs to QA the URLs each week, so I’m looking for either a view that can provide them the list of de-duplicated (unique) URLs in the board. They could export and remove duplicates but it’s the extra steps I’m trying to avoid - and would love to keep it in platform, ideally creating either a mirror board or dashboard that allows us to check when QA’d

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app for that. The app has various functions you can use to either identify your duplicates using a label, merge, delete or move them to a specified group.

posts.author: AlichiaS (Ali Sawitoski)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for responding, got approval to add this app from our IT lead so going to give it a whirl!
